---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for TWW3 Companion
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to see. Avoid implementation detail unless it helps explain the idea.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about.

## Scope check

Does this align with project non-goals in [README.md](../../README.md)? If it might conflict, explain why it should still be considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or links to related issues.
